temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) The scene opens with a slow pan from behind a large, dark green object, revealing a dimly lit office. Several people are seated at desks, illuminated by the warm glow of individual desk lamps. The blinds on the windows are closed, casting horizontal shadows across the room. A whiteboard with writing on it is visible in the background. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes the setting and introduces the main characters, who are working late into the night in a busy office environment.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ambient, and slightly tense musical score begins to play.)
(00:03-00:05) A close-up shot focuses on a young man with dark hair. He is wearing a green t-shirt and a silver watch. He smiles slightly as he carefully inserts a small white earbud into his right ear, his expression suggesting he is about to listen to something. (Storyline: This shot introduces a key character and his action of putting in an earbud, which will likely be significant to the plot.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The ambient, tense music continues.)
